summary: CPU functional tests job failed in 14 seconds because the openvino_tests artifact download failed (completed in <300ms with no success message), so tests never ran and the upload-artifact step found no files.

root_cause.explanation: The CPU functional tests job ran for only 14 seconds. The openvino_package artifact downloaded successfully (~6s). The openvino_tests artifact download started at 10:23:15.988Z but the next step began at 10:23:16.275Z (287ms later), with no download-success message. No test execution was logged. The job ended when upload-artifact failed with 'No files were found'. The PR (TFLite FE bounds fix) is unrelated to the Windows CPU test infrastructure.
evidence: openvino_tests download started 10:23:15.988Z; upload-artifact step started 10:23:16.275Z (287ms gap, no success message)
No test execution output in the 121-line job log
##[error]No files were found with the provided path ... No artifacts will be uploaded.
